name: Persist files
description: Persist specified files between devcontainer runs through a volume.

user.description: User to setup persisted directories for.

group.description: Group to setup persisted directories for.

paths.description: Comma-separated list of typed paths to persist. Entries must be formatted as directory:/absolute/path or file:/absolute/path. Use $USER to reference the configured user. If a path does not exist yet, the requested file or directory is stubbed in the persistent volume before creating the symlink.
